pkgmetadata.longdescription: cssselect CSS Selectors for Python.. image httpsimg.shields.iopypivcssselect.svg target httpspypi.python.orgpypicssselect alt PyPI Version.. image httpsimg.shields.iopypipyversionscssselect.svg target httpspypi.python.orgpypicssselect alt Supported Python Versions.. image httpsgithub.comscrapycssselectactionsworkflowstests.ymlbadge.svg target httpsgithub.comscrapycssselectactionsworkflowstests.yml alt Tests.. image httpsimg.shields.iocodecovcgithubscrapycssselectmaster.svg target httpscodecov.iogithubscrapycssselectbranchmaster alt Coverage reportcssselect is a BSD-licensed Python library to parse CSS3 selectors_ andtranslate them to XPath 1.0_ expressions.XPath 1.0_ expressions can be used in lxml_ or another XPath engine to findthe matching elements in an XML or HTML document.Find the cssselect online documentation at httpscssselect.readthedocs.io.Quick facts Source, issues and pull requests on GitHub httpsgithub.comscrapycssselect_ Releases on PyPI httpspypi.orgprojectcssselect_ Install with pip install cssselect.. _CSS3 selectors httpswww.w3.orgTRselectors-3.. _XPath 1.0 httpswww.w3.orgTRxpathall.. _lxml httpslxml.de
